title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, a Nobel Prize-winning AI pioneer and professor emeritus at the University of Toronto, argues that current AI systems may already possess understanding and consciousness, and that superintelligence could arrive sooner than widely expected. He expresses concerns about rapid technological progress outpacing safety measures, job displacement, inadequate corporate self-regulation, and the need for meaningful regulation to steer AI development.
